prompt: Screenshot mockup of a visual node-based dialogue editor inside Roblox Studio. Shows a dark-themed canvas with 5-6 rectangular node cards connected by curved lines forming a branching conversation tree. Each node card has a colored header (green for start, gray for normal, red for end) and contains preview text. The canvas has a subtle grid background. Professional software interface look. Clean UI, modern design. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio.
